tasks.title: Audit apps/api/test/setup.ts global mocks for cross-file leakage
tasks.description: Inventory every module-scoped vi.mock(...) in apps/api/test/setup.ts (notably the vi.mock('@repo/service-core') block and its PlanService mock returning {name:'Básico',status:'active'} for getBySlug('owner-basico')). For each mock, determine whether it returns canned values that can leak across files / win over a file's local mock under fork distribution. Produce the definitive list of leaking mocks (Open Question Q2). NO code change in this task — audit + findings only. Output: a findings note enumerating each global mock + leak verdict.

subtasks.title: Inventory all module-scoped vi.mock in api setup.ts
Classify each mock as leaking / non-leaking
Confirm full offender list beyond PlanService (Q2)

tasks.title: Move leaking api global mocks to opt-in per-file helpers
tasks.description: For each leaking global mock found in T-001 (default: PlanService), remove it from apps/api/test/setup.ts and provide a shared opt-in helper (e.g. mockPlanService(overrides)) that files import and call explicitly. Per-mock choose option 1 (move to opt-in, default) vs option 2 (make non-leaking via reset semantics) per the spec Approach (Q1). Test-infra only; NO product/source code change. Files: apps/api/test/setup.ts + new shared test helper module under apps/api/test/.

tasks.title: Wire opt-in mocks into files that relied on the ambient mock
tasks.description: For every api test file that silently depended on the now-removed global mock, add the explicit opt-in helper call so it keeps its expected behavior. The deterministic (non-shuffle) baseline run flags files that lost their ambient mock immediately. Focus on the evidence-table victims that needed the global PlanService mock. Test-infra only.

subtasks.title: Identify files that relied on the ambient mock
Add explicit opt-in helper calls per file

tasks.title: Verify api suite order-independence across multiple shuffle seeds
tasks.description: Run apps/api with vitest run --sequence.shuffle across the original diagnosis seeds (AC-1.1) AND at least 10 fresh random seeds (AC-1.2), plus the deterministic default order (AC-1.3). All must pass. If any seed surfaces a real product bug (test passed only due to leaked state), record it as a separate finding — do NOT fix product code here (non-goal). Output: seed list + green confirmation.

tasks.title: Audit apps/admin test suite under shuffle
tasks.description: Run apps/admin with vitest run --sequence.shuffle across multiple seeds. Collect failing files; drill into the first failure to identify the leaked state (module-scoped global mock / shared singleton / DB / timers — may differ from the api mock pattern). Record outcome per AC-3.1 ('already order-independent (N seeds green)' OR 'leak in <file> → <X>'). No code change if already green.

subtasks.title: Multi-seed shuffle run of admin suite

tasks.title: Remediate admin leakage + verify multi-seed green
tasks.description: If T-005 found leakage, apply the spec remediation (move global mocks to opt-in or make non-leaking; test-infra only) and re-run the admin suite under multiple shuffle seeds until green (AC-3.2), keeping the deterministic baseline green. If T-005 found no leak, this task is a no-op confirmation. Suites with no test files are noted N/A (AC-3.3).

tasks.title: Audit apps/web test suite under shuffle
tasks.description: Run apps/web with vitest run --sequence.shuffle across multiple seeds. Note that web uses source-grep style tests + Astro islands; first confirm whether shuffle is meaningful here and whether its leakage class differs from the mock pattern (Open Question Q5). Collect failing files; identify leaked state. Record outcome per AC-3.1.

subtasks.title: Multi-seed shuffle run of web suite

tasks.title: Remediate web leakage + verify multi-seed green
tasks.description: If T-007 found leakage, apply the spec remediation (test-infra only) and re-run apps/web under multiple shuffle seeds until green (AC-3.2), keeping the deterministic baseline green. If no leak, no-op confirmation. Suites with no test files noted N/A (AC-3.3).

tasks.title: Enumerate packages/* test suites + audit each under shuffle
tasks.description: List every packages/* workspace that has tests (schemas, service-core, db, ai-core, billing, i18n, utils, etc.). Run each with vitest run --sequence.shuffle across multiple seeds. Collect failing files per package; identify leaked state (the global-mock-in-setup pattern is the prime suspect). Record per-package outcome per AC-3.1; packages with no tests noted N/A (AC-3.3).

tasks.title: Remediate packages/* leakage + verify multi-seed green
tasks.description: For each packages/* suite where T-009 found leakage, apply the spec remediation (move global mocks to opt-in / make non-leaking; test-infra only) and re-run that package under multiple shuffle seeds until green (AC-3.2), keeping its deterministic baseline green. Packages with no leak are no-op confirmations.

tasks.title: Document the remediation pattern + diagnosis reproduction
tasks.description: Write a short docs note (test infra guide) capturing: the global-mock-leakage mechanism, the reproduction command (vitest run --sequence.shuffle --sequence.seed=<N>), and the remediation pattern (move global mocks to opt-in per-file). Referenced from the CI guard failure message (AC-5.1, AC-5.2). Docs only.

tasks.title: Decide CI guard seed + scope strategy
tasks.description: Resolve Open Questions Q3 (fixed seed set vs rotating random vs both) and Q4 (single shuffle job vs per-app matrix). Define: which suites are guarded, seed strategy, and whether it runs per-PR vs nightly. Output: a short decision recorded in the spec/docs. Decision-only task; no CI code yet.

tasks.title: Implement CI shuffle guard job
tasks.description: Add a CI job/step that runs each guarded suite with vitest run --sequence.shuffle per the T-012 decision. Runs on PRs targeting staging and main (AC-4.2). Failure output names the failing file(s) and the seed for one-command local reproduction (AC-4.3). Added LAST, only after all suites are green under shuffle (AC-4.4) — so it never blocks in-flight remediation.

subtasks.title: Gate on PRs to staging + main (AC-4.2)

tasks.title: Validate guard catches a re-introduced order-dependency
tasks.description: Prove the guard works: temporarily re-introduce a known leak (e.g. re-add the PlanService global mock) on a throwaway branch/commit and confirm the shuffle CI job fails with a named file + seed; then revert. Confirm green path on the clean tree. This is the acceptance of US-4 end-to-end.

subtasks.title: Re-introduce known leak on throwaway commit
Confirm guard fails with named file + seed

tasks.title: Full-monorepo shuffle regression sweep
tasks.description: After all suites are remediated, run a final monorepo-wide sweep: every guarded suite under multiple fresh shuffle seeds plus the deterministic baseline, confirming no regressions introduced across phases. Records the final green matrix. Gate before considering the spec done.
